items.title: US launches more strikes on Iran with blasts reported in south of country
items.summary: Trump says the attacks are "retribution for yesterday's bombing of ships by Iran". Iran earlier promised strong retaliation.

items.title: Democrat Graham Platner suspends campaign for key US Senate race after assault allegation
items.summary: The decision came days after a woman accused him of sexual assault, an accusation he says is "categorically false".

items.title: Platner's disastrous candidacy exposes rifts that could dampen Democrats' Senate hopes
items.summary: Along with creating tumult in a must-win race for Democrats, Graham Platner's exit is laying bare division between the party's left wing and moderates.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 廣西洪災「有鱷魚逃出」是假消息？ 災民分享「警槍殺2隻」影片
items.summary: 中國廣西壯族自治區橫州市六藍水庫，6日因暴雨決堤，導致下游村莊被洪水淹沒、多人逃生不及被沖走，當地蛇類養殖場、動物園也傳出動物逃出或失蹤。橫州市地方政府稱，網傳洪災導致「鱷魚逃出...…

items.title: 伊朗控美軍炸毀鐵路橋樑 哈米尼葬禮交通受阻
